system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content:
Hello, this is Yusuf Rossi. I recently received my order #W2378156, and I wanted to arrange an exchange for a couple of items. First, I ordered a mechanical keyboard, and I'd like to exchange it for the same model but with clicky switches instead of the current ones. Ideally, it should have RGB backlighting and be full size. If there isn't a clicky switch option with RGB backlight available, then I'd be okay with the same keyboard but without backlighting.

Second, I also ordered a smart thermostat, and I'd like to exchange it for one that is compatible with Google Home instead of Apple HomeKit.

I want to make sure we get both exchanges sorted out in one go. I live in zip code 19122. Unfortunately, I don't recall the email address I used for the order. Could you help me with this?

Hello Yusuf, I have located your user profile with the email yusuf.rossi7301@example.com and found your order #W2378156. The order contains the mechanical keyboard and smart thermostat you mentioned.

For the mechanical keyboard, the exact model with clicky switches, RGB backlighting, and full size is currently not available. However, there is a full-size mechanical keyboard with clicky switches and no backlighting available.

For the smart thermostat, there is a compatible model with Google Assistant (Google Home) in black color available.

To proceed with the exchange, I will need you to confirm the following details:
1. Exchange the mechanical keyboard (item id 1151293680) to the full-size clicky switch keyboard without backlighting (item id 7706410293).
2. Exchange the smart thermostat (item id 4983901480) to the Google Assistant compatible black thermostat (item id 7747408585).
3. Use your credit card ending in 2478 for any price difference payment or refund.

Please confirm if all these details are correct and if you want to proceed with the exchange. Also, confirm that you have provided all items you want to exchange in this order.

Thank you for finding my profile and order details. Yes, I confirm the following:

1. Exchange the mechanical keyboard (item id 1151293680) for the full-size clicky switch keyboard without backlighting (item id 7706410293).
2. Exchange the smart thermostat (item id 4983901480) for the Google Assistant compatible black thermostat (item id 7747408585).
3. Use my credit card ending in 2478 for any price difference payment or refund.

Also, I have provided all the items I want to exchange in this order. Please proceed with the exchange. Let me know if you need any further information from me.
